meta.title: Dt. Muhammed Furkan Pazar — Dentist | Taşucu, Silifke, Mersin
meta.description: General dentistry practice in Taşucu, Silifke (Mersin). Fillings, root canal treatment, implants, prosthetics and preventive care. Communication in English, Russian and Turkish.

hero.title: Dt. Muhammed Furkan Pazar
hero.lead: Diagnosis, treatment and preventive care for oral and dental health. Examinations and consultations are available in English, Russian and Turkish.

services.title: Areas of Treatment
services.intro: The procedures offered at our practice are listed below. Every treatment is planned together with the patient, after an examination and diagnosis.

filling.title: Fillings & Restorative Care
filling.desc: Repairing decayed or damaged teeth with tooth-coloured filling materials.

root.title: Root Canal Treatment
root.desc: Cleaning the inflamed or damaged tissue inside the tooth so that the tooth can be preserved.

implant.title: Dental Implants
implant.desc: Replacing missing teeth with an implant placed in the jawbone, restored with a prosthesis. Suitability is assessed through examination and imaging.

prosthesis.title: Prosthetics (Crowns & Bridges)
prosthesis.desc: Fixed and removable prostheses to restore the function and appearance of missing teeth.

whitening.title: Teeth Whitening
whitening.desc: A procedure aimed at lightening tooth shade. Results vary from person to person; suitability is assessed at an examination.

pediatric.title: Children's Dentistry
pediatric.desc: Treatment of decay in children, preventive measures (fissure sealants, fluoride) and building the habit of regular check-ups.

cleaning.title: Scaling & Cleaning
cleaning.desc: Removal of tartar and plaque to help maintain healthy gums.

extraction.title: Tooth Extraction
extraction.desc: Extraction of teeth that cannot be preserved by treatment, under local anaesthesia.

doctor.title: Dt. Muhammed Furkan Pazar
doctor.bio: I graduated from the Faculty of Dentistry at İzmir Kâtip Çelebi University in 2021 and have been seeing patients in Taşucu ever since. In 2025 I opened my own practice, where I work alongside my assistant team.
doctor.bio2: My work is treatment-focused; my priority is a conservative approach that respects the biology of the tooth and the surrounding tissues. I pay close attention to detail: the treatment plan is built together with the patient after an examination, going through the options and the reasoning behind them.
doctor.fact_edu: İzmir Kâtip Çelebi University, Faculty of Dentistry, 2021

approach.title: How We Work
approach.item1_desc: Instrument sterilisation and infection control are carried out for every patient according to current standards.
approach.item2_desc: After the examination, the diagnosis, treatment options and process are explained clearly; decisions are made together with the patient.
approach.item3_desc: The treatment plan is prepared after an examination and any necessary imaging, according to the patient's needs.
approach.item4_desc: Examinations, consultations and correspondence are available in English, Russian and Turkish.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.q1: What happens at the first appointment?
faq.a1: An oral examination is carried out and an X-ray is taken if needed. Your current condition and treatment options are explained, and next steps are decided together.
faq.a2: It is the cleaning of inflamed or damaged tissue inside the tooth and the filling of the root canals. The number of visits depends on the condition of the tooth and is determined at the examination.
faq.q3: How does the implant process work?
faq.a3: First, the jawbone is assessed through an examination and imaging. If suitable, the implant is placed; after a healing period, a prosthesis is fitted on top. Timelines vary from person to person.
faq.a4: No. How long the effect lasts varies by person and depends on diet, tea, coffee and tobacco use, and oral care habits.
faq.q5: When should my child first see a dentist?
faq.a5: An introductory check-up is recommended soon after the first teeth come through. An early visit allows preventive care to be planned in good time.
faq.q6: Is communication in English or Russian possible?
faq.a6: Yes. Examinations, consultations and messaging are available in English, Russian and Turkish.

contact.title: Address & Opening Hours
contact.address: Taşucu Mahallesi, Fevzi Paşa Sokak, No: 22A/A, Silifke / Mersin, Türkiye
contact.reach_desc: For any questions, message us on WhatsApp or Telegram.

footer.disclaimer: The information on this site is for general information only; it does not replace an examination or diagnosis. The treatment plan may change after an examination.
